displayTitle: Star Wars (2015) #66: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part V
synopsis: "THE SCOURGING OF SHU-TORUN" PART 5. QUEEN TRIOS vs. PRINCESS LEIA at last! Can LUKE SKYWALKER hold out against the attack of overwhelming force...from his own allies?! And when you think things couldn't get worse for our Rebels, there's always an orbital bombardment to survive!
title: Star Wars (2015) #66: The Scourging Of Shu-Torun Part V
